description: A winter scene depicting armed soldiers and revolutionaries advancing through snow toward the Kremlin walls and towers in Moscow. The large fortified gate and a tall tower with a pointed spire dominate the center and right. Groups of armed figures in dark coats run and take positions across a snow-covered square. Bare winter trees line the left side. The atmosphere is cold and grey with the buildings rendered in muted ochres and browns against a pale sky. The scene conveys chaotic military action in an urban setting.
